title: Disclose and shadow-measure exit advisory replay gap
hypothesis: Explicitly disclosing the exit advisory replay gap prevents future agents from treating production advisory exits and backtest target exits as equivalent.
scope: Add exit_advisory_shadow_attribution without executing advisory rules.
Correct partial-reduce replay wording from default-off to default-on container with disabled pure trailing trims.
Update production/backtest parity docs and backtesting docs.
Add an anti-repeat pointer to exp-20260429-032.
non_goals: Do not change stop, target, partial-reduce, add-on, entry, sizing, or LLM behavior.
Do not retry SIGNAL_TARGET partial-reduce replay.
acceptance: Backtester result schema exposes the exit advisory replay gap.
Backtester result schema reports shadow-only advisory rule counts and grouped realized outcomes.
Docs no longer imply all production position actions are fully replayed.
A focused parity test covers the disclosure helper.
